channel.title: SHENZHEN CoolKit Technology CO., LTD. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by SHENZHEN CoolKit Technology CO., LTD. (coolkit).

item.title: CVE-2024-7206 · 7 HIGH — Firmware extraction and Hardware SSL Pinning Bypass
item.description: SSL Pinning Bypass in eWeLink Some hardware products allows local ATTACKER to Decrypt TLS communication and Extract secrets to clone the device via Flash the modified firmware

item.title: CVE-2024-7205 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ ☁️ — sharing unnecessary device-sensitive information allows Secondary user able to take over devices as primary user
item.description: When the device is shared, the homepage module are before 2.19.0 in eWeLink Cloud Service allows Secondary user to take over devices as primary user via sharing unnecessary device-sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2024-3130 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Insecure Data Storage leading to sensitive Information disclosure.
item.description: Hard-coded Credentials in CoolKit eWeLlink app are before 5.4.x on Android and IOS allows local attacker to unauthorized access to sensitive data via Decryption algorithm and key obtained after decompiling app
